params.description: Animation begins: the 4 Chips symbols from the previous section start transforming into 4 bag containers, each revealing 5 items inside.

beats.text: Wait. Look at what those symbols were hiding.

params.description: Animation completes: 4 bag containers now visible, each clearly showing 5 items inside. Visual continuation from the graph symbols.

elements.description: Picture graph with Chips row transformed: 4 bag containers displayed, each containing 5 items. Animation complete.

beats.text: 4 symbols. Each symbol held 5 items. That's 4 groups of 5. Look familiar? This is called MULTIPLICATION. You've been doing multiplication this whole time.
How many groups do you see?

validator.description: Student answered 4, correct number of groups

beats.text: 4 groups. And remember? 5 in each group. That's 4 groups of 5. And guess what? There's a symbol for that: 4 × 5.

elements.description: Picture graph with Chips row showing 4 bag containers, each containing 5 items. Multiple choice interaction complete.
